description: Phase IV-A4 boundary test for the Stage 24.2 threshold law and the Stage 24.3 preserved ordering relation on the frozen clustered Dirac-Kahler width-retreat manifold.
selected_ordering_expression: lower flow_concentration_index orders with longer topology_survival_time inside the stable smeared sector

family_ledger.notes: Positive support survives in this family.
The threshold law excludes the entire family from the stable smeared sector.
The threshold law excludes the entire family from the stable smeared sector.

final_interpretation: On the frozen clustered DK width-retreat manifold, the Stage 24.2 threshold law remains portable as an exact selector, but the Stage 24.3 inverse flow-survival ordering survives only on the strong-asymmetry anchor family. At the first retreat to width_ratio = 1.15, the law still classifies correctly but the positive stable smeared set disappears, so the ordering relation becomes undefined rather than gradually degrading. The extension boundary is therefore set by loss of positive support outside the anchor family, not by failure of the threshold selector itself.
